response:
Subject: Thank You for Your Support  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I hope this message finds you well.  

I would like to clarify that the current machine vision system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. Based on the technical data provided, the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor. I have attached the relevant technical documentation to this email for your reference.  

Please review the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file, specifically page 18, for detailed specifications, and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13, for information on quantum efficiency. I will carefully study these documents and provide you with further details and any additional questions I may have.  

Thank you again for your support and assistance.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
